schema: GitHub REST API PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/branches/{branch}/protection payload, wrapped with NurseConnect activation metadata
activation_note: This file is declarative repo evidence only until an authorized maintainer applies payload with the gh command below. GitHub server-side branch protection is the enforcement source of truth.

activation_requirements.required_role: repository admin or owner with branch-protection permission
activation_requirements.scope_guard: Apply only to arbenl/nurseconnect-v3 main. Do not run this command on forks or other repositories.

codeowners_note: CODEOWNERS currently maps high-risk paths to @arbenl. Add a backup owner before requiring code-owner reviews for a larger team.
context_sync_note: Keep required_status_checks.contexts synchronized with .github/workflows/ci.yml job names and external GitGuardian status names.
last_push_approval_note: require_last_push_approval is false for the current single-owner workflow. Revisit when additional maintainers can approve each other's latest pushes.
